ops.title: cc-steer: eval-v3 freeze decision (due 2026-07-24) — accrual running BELOW plan assumption

ops.text: run 'uv run python -m harness.addendum count' in cc-steer-lab; if projected < 100 corrective rows, decide: extend window vs broaden strata vs freeze underpowered (user call); journal the decision in EXP eval-v3
